video_job.actor_prompt: Cinematic medium shot in a warm Japanese fantasy RPG guild forge with wooden textures. Yuna Starling, an androgynous healer in cream and mint robes, and Yuna Moonvale, an androgynous ranger in a green half-cape with a leaf brooch, work together at a workbench. Starling firmly steadies a metal shield while Moonvale carefully guides a repair tool across the surface. Soft forge lighting, focused expressions, cooperative hands, no text, no watermark.
video_job.target_continuation_prompt: Same continuous forge shot, consistent camera angle and lighting. Yuna Moonvale taps the final harmless repair mark on the shield with the tool while Yuna Starling maintains a steady, supportive grip. Friendly teamwork, clear tool motion, warm ambient forge glow, no text, no watermark.
video_job.safety_notes: The interaction is strictly professional and cooperative, focused on a fantasy crafting task. No sexual, violent, or inappropriate content is depicted. All visual elements adhere to the requested guild aesthetic.

timeline_story.selection_reason: The forge is experiencing a bottleneck due to the influx of gear needing repair for the vanguard patrol; Yuna Starling and Yuna Moonvale coordinate to stabilize and repair the equipment efficiently.

relationship_adjustments.reason: Collaborative repair effort during a guild bottleneck.
Grateful for assistance during high-pressure forge repairs.
